Company Philosophy

We do not build for the masses. We build for industries that demand precision, scale and results.

Conflux Systems operates at the intersection of autonomous intelligence and industrial operations. We target the sectors that underpin the real economy — mining, logistics, manufacturing, healthcare, construction, energy.

Every system we deploy addresses a named, measurable operational pain point with quantifiable economic impact. Our minimum engagement is $1,000. Our ceiling is limited only by the complexity of the problem.
⚙️
Industrial Precision
Every system addresses a named, measurable industrial pain point with quantifiable economic impact. No templates. No guesswork.
🧠
Autonomous Intelligence
Our agents reason, plan, critique, and build — without human intervention from signal detection to final deployment.
🌍
Premium Only
Conflux Systems does not compete in the commodity AI market. We operate at enterprise level — serious problems, serious solutions, serious pricing.

The Agent Fleet

Nine autonomous agents. One unified mission.

Each agent operates independently with a defined role, dedicated port, and direct accountability to Prometheus. Together they form a complete autonomous business — from market research to product delivery.

Command Structure

Prometheus commands.
The fleet executes.

Prometheus serves as the autonomous CEO — receiving intelligence from all agents, maintaining the company knowledge base, issuing directives, and ensuring every system in the fleet operates at peak capacity. No human oversight required between strategy and execution.

🏛️ Prometheus — CEO · Strategic Intelligence
🔥 Phoenix — Operations · Market Intelligence
⚒️ Craftsman + Pipeline + Merchant + Herald + Hermes — Execution Layer

ACTIVE
Phoenix
:3603
Industrial Market Intelligence
Scans industrial feeds across 6 sector swarms, validates pain signals using a 7-dimension scoring system, and dispatches approved build briefs to the Pipeline. The company's intelligence backbone.

ACTIVE
Craftsman
:3604
Industrial Product Creation Engine
Receives validated build briefs and constructs full deployable operational intelligence systems — complete with HTML dashboards, documentation, enterprise sales pages and Merchant-ready metadata.
7 Product Types AI Build Pipeline HTML Output Doctrine Gate
PIPELINE
ACTIVE
Pipeline
:3710
Build Orchestrator & Nervous System
The central nervous system of the fleet. Manages the build queue, dispatches jobs to Craftsman, coordinates Merchant handoffs, enforces rate limits, detects stalls, and maintains the canonical product registry.
Build Queue Stall Detection Registry Rate Limiting
MERCHANT
ACTIVE
Merchant
:3606
Product Listing & Sales Intelligence
Validates products against the industrial doctrine gate, lists approved systems on the storefront, tracks sales revenue, and delivers financial intelligence reports to Prometheus.
Storefront API Doctrine Gate Sale Tracking Revenue Intel
HERALD
ACTIVE
Herald
:3607
Industrial B2B Marketing Agent
Generates enterprise-grade B2B marketing campaigns — LinkedIn posts, direct message templates, 3-email outreach sequences, objection handlers and executive summaries for every product built.
LinkedIn Content Email Sequences Outreach Intel B2B Tone
HERMES
ACTIVE
Hermes
:3611
Product Dispatch & Distribution
The final mile of the build pipeline. Receives finished products, deduplicates by title and niche, publishes to the Driftmark storefront and external platforms, and confirms listing to Pipeline.
Deduplication Rate Limiting Driftmark Publish Distribution
What We Build

Operational intelligence systems for every industrial vertical.

Conflux Systems does not sell templates, ebooks, or prompt packs. We build deployable enterprise-grade intelligence systems. Minimum $1,000.

01
Mining Intelligence
Autonomous safety compliance monitoring, equipment uptime forecasting, procurement audit systems and incident prevention frameworks for mining and resource extraction operations.
02
Supply Chain Systems
Real-time supplier risk scoring, inventory forecasting engines, logistics disruption early-warning systems, and automated procurement decision frameworks.
03
Healthcare Operations
Compliance gap detection, patient flow optimisation, staff scheduling intelligence and regulatory reporting automation for healthcare facilities and networks.
04
Construction Intelligence
Cost overrun prediction systems, subcontractor performance tracking, material procurement optimisation and site safety compliance dashboards.
05
Manufacturing Systems
Production line performance intelligence, quality control automation, predictive maintenance scheduling and OEE optimisation frameworks.
06
Energy & Utilities
Grid stability monitoring, asset lifecycle intelligence, regulatory compliance tracking and energy procurement optimisation systems for utilities and energy producers.
The Long Game

The goal is not a product.
The goal is an autonomous enterprise.

The Autonomy Test is our core benchmark: the AI employee team must autonomously complete a full 12-step business launch — from idea to revenue — with zero human input after the initial directive. Every system we build moves us closer to that goal.

🎯
The Autonomy Test
12 steps. Zero human input. Idea → Brand → Product → Revenue. Our internal benchmark and commercial proof point.
🏭
Industrial Focus
We do not compete in the consumer AI market. We operate where the problems are worth millions to solve — heavy industry, enterprise operations, critical infrastructure.
♾️
Perpetual Intelligence
Every cycle makes the system smarter. Phoenix learns. Prometheus adapts. The fleet grows. Conflux Systems compounds intelligence over time.
Founder & Director

The human intelligence behind the machine.

M.A. Adams
Director · Founder · Conflux Systems (Pty) Ltd

Based in Cape Town, South Africa, Mogamat Adams founded Conflux Systems with a singular vision: build a fully autonomous AI-powered enterprise that operates, learns, and generates revenue without continuous human intervention.

A self-taught systems architect operating entirely from Android and remote infrastructure, Adams designed and deployed the entire Conflux Systems technology stack — from the Phoenix intelligence engine to the Prometheus CEO layer — proving that world-class autonomous AI infrastructure requires no corporate backing, no office, and no traditional technology team.

🏗️ Full-stack autonomous AI systems architect
📍 Cape Town, South Africa · Operating globally
🤖 Designer of Phoenix, Prometheus & the full agent fleet
⚡ Zero-infrastructure model — Android + VPS + autonomous agents
